series_metadata.series_description: Consists of all documentation dealing with grants coordinated by and through the OTSO. Includes federal 3rd grade program documentation, closeouts, grant files, form GR-50, annual reports and general correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain past federal fiscal year in office, then transfer to ODPS Record Center for two (2) years, then destroy. Total retention period is three (3) years., Paper: Recycle
